title: Self Improvement Durable Residue Closeout
goal: Make repo-local self-improvement closeout require a durable-residue routing answer before claiming improvement.
non_goals: Do not make self-improvement a shipped host-repo feature.
Do not turn every self-improvement pass into a broad documentation review.
Do not duplicate Memory content in planning archives.

intent.outcome: Self-improvement passes distinguish validation, issue closure, intent satisfaction, operating-cost direction, and durable-residue routing.
intent.constraints: Keep this repo-local skill guidance, not package authority.
intent.latitude: Update the skill and maintainer-surface tests.
intent.escalation: Escalate if shared package workflow or product direction needs to change.

execution.proof: Maintainer-surface tests, proof selector, planning-surface check.

invariants: Durable motivation and lessons route to Memory/docs/contracts/checks/planning before closeout.
Validation success, issue completion, intent satisfaction, cost reduction, and residue routing remain separate answers.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Route durable motivation and lessons out of planning archives.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Self-improvement closeout cannot claim improvement while durable residue is only in archives.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The skill itself is the right repo-local surface for this closeout requirement; no shipped package workflow change was needed.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Maintainer-surface tests and proof-selected workspace checks pass.

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Finish the final child in durable-residue-routing.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Check that the skill requires a durable-residue answer distinct from validation and cost assessment.

execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py -q; uv run ruff check tests; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Memory package or planning package runtime unless proof selects it.

stop_conditions.stop when: #495 acceptance is met, validated, archived, committed, pushed, closed, evidence refreshed, and #491 can be assessed.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: If this needs shipped host-repo package behavior rather than repo-local skill guidance.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: If changes broaden into unrelated self-improvement workflow redesign.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: If maintainer-surface proof no longer covers the claim.

context_budget.live working set: self-improvement skill, maintainer-surface tests, active execplan.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update this execplan with proof and closeout.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Implementing #495 durable-residue routing in self-improvement closeout.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before parent #491 reconciliation or after proof failure.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Implement remaining planned work lane by lane.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Dogfood package; commit/push per milestone; preserve repo-/agent-/tool-/language-agnostic shipped package behavior.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Repo-local skill guidance would become shipped package policy.

immediate_next_action: Patch self-improvement-dogfooding closeout guidance with durable-residue routing fields and tests.
invariants: Durable residue must not remain only in archived execplans or issue closeout.
Cost reduction is separate from durable residue routing.
This is repo-local skill guidance, not shipped package workflow.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Self-improvement closeout must record validation_passed, issue_completed, intent_satisfied, operating_cost_reduced, and durable_residue_routed as separate answers.
open_questions_to_close: Which exact fields should the skill require for durable-residue routing?
completion_criteria: Self-improvement closeout requires a durable-residue routing answer.
Cost assessment references consumed/routed residue where relevant.
A self-improvement pass cannot honestly close as improved if future-relevant motivation is only archived.

execution_run.what happened: Updated the repo-local self-improvement skill so closeout requires separate answers for validation, issue completion, intent satisfaction, operating-cost direction, and durable-residue routing; added maintainer-surface coverage for those requirements.
execution_run.scope touched: repo-local skill guidance, maintainer-surface tests, planning state, and active execplan
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py -q; uv run ruff check tests; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/self-improvement-durable-residue-closeout.plan.json tools/skills/self-improvement-dogfooding/SKILL.md tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests
execution_run.result for continuation: #495 acceptance is met; assess and close #491 parent after #495 is closed and evidence is refreshed.
execution_run.next step: Archive this plan, commit/push, close #495, refresh evidence, and assess #491.

finished_run_review.follow-on decision: Close #495 after commit; reconcile #491 parent next.

proof_report.proof achieved now: maintainer-surface test, planning check, proof-selected workspace CLI tests, and lint all passed
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py passed; tests/test_workspace_cli.py passed; ruff check src tests passed; planning doctor healthy

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Self-improvement closeout guidance now requires durable_residue_consumed_or_routed and a Required Durable-Residue Routing section with explicit closeout fields; tests assert the requirement and archive-only prohibition.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make self-improvement lower-cost and honest about durable residue.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can durable lessons now leave planning archives through every closeout path in #491?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #495 acceptance is implemented and proof-selected checks passed; the #491 parent has no remaining implementation child after this slice, though upstream issue closure/evidence refresh still needs to be performed.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py guards required durable-residue routing closeout fields; tools/skills/self-improvement-dogfooding/SKILL.md is the repo-local operating guidance.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Self-improvement closeout can claim improvement while future-relevant motivation remains only archived.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Self-improvement closeout needs a durable-residue routing answer distinct from validation and cost assessment.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Dogfooding improvements otherwise repeat old mistakes when the only durable why is in archived plans or issue closeout.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: Already promoted into repo-local skill guidance and guard test.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Self-improvement closeout now requires durable-residue routing before claiming improvement.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Durable residue promoted to repo-local skill guidance with maintainer-surface tests.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): Skill guidance and tests, not Memory; this is operating guidance rather than durable repo fact.

discard: Per-command execution detail; validations are preserved in this archive and commit history.
config_check: tests/test_maintainer_surfaces.py now guards the self-improvement closeout fields.

drift_log: 2026-04-28: Implemented, validated, and routed durable closeout guidance into the self-improvement skill and maintainer-surface tests.
